Encypher C2PA Verifier Test Page

Unsigned Content

This is regular text without any C2PA or Encypher signatures. The extension should not detect any embeddings in this paragraph.

Signed Content (Placeholder)

This paragraph would contain signed content with invisible embeddings. To test with real signed content, use the Sign tab in the extension or call the /api/v1/sign endpoint.

Test Instructions

  1. Load the extension in Chrome (chrome://extensions → Load unpacked)
  2. Open this page
  3. Click the extension icon to see the popup
  4. The "Verify" tab should show "No Signed Content" for this test page
  5. Go to the "Sign" tab, enter some text, and click "Sign Content"
  6. Paste the signed text into a page and verify the badge appears

API Test

To test against the local API:

  1. Start the Enterprise API: cd enterprise_api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --port 9000
  2. Open extension settings and set API URL to http://localhost:9000
  3. Add your API key (or use demo_key for testing)
  4. Try signing content from the popup
